case_title: FANNIE L. CLARKE VS. MERCY HOUSING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CLARKE, FANNIE L. AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING, INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS NEBRASKA MERCY HOUSING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF FANNIE L. CLARKE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING, INC DBA AS NEBRASKA MERCY HOUSING IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SALLY LI, PROPERTY MANAGER AND LARISA ABRAMOVA, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARKE, FANNIE L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING, INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS NEBRASKA MERCY HOUSING, INC. $1,050.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
